song.title: Glory Be to God the Father
song.author: J. F. Garland, Ira Sankey
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G2 C2 Glory be to God the Father, .G2 D And to Christ the Son, .G2 C2 Glory to the Holy Spirit - .G2 D G2 Ever One.
[V2] As we view the vast creation, Planned with wonderous skill, So our hearts would move to worship, And be still.
[V3] But, our God, how great Thy yearning To have sons who love In the Son e'en now to praise Thee, Love to prove!
[V4] 'Twas Thy thought in revelation, To present to men Secrets of Thine own affections, Theirs to win.
[V5] So in Christ, through his redemption (Vanquished evil powers!) Thou hast brought, in new creation, Worshippers!
[V6] Glory be to God the Father, And to Christ the Son, Glory to the Holy Spirit - Ever One.
